Formulate bead body via LLM (sonnet-class via ZAI proxy)\n2. Create bead using br CLI\n3. Return pending-card spec with bead reference\n\nThe bead watcher bridges bead closure to result delivery.\n\"\"\"\n\nimport asyncio\nimport json\nimport uuid\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, field\nfrom datetime import datetime, timezone\nfrom enum import Enum\nfrom logging import getLogger\nfrom pathlib import Path\nfrom typing import Any, Optional\n\nimport httpx\n\nfrom ..session.store import get_store\nfrom .llm import get_zai_client, LLMRequest, ModelClass\n\n\nlogger = getLogger(__name__)\n\n# Project workspace for beads (where br CLI operates)\nBEADS_WORKSPACE = Path.home() / \".beads\"\n\n# Escalate prompt path\nESCALATE_PROMPT_PATH = Path(\"/home/coding/aide-de-camp/prompts/escalate/task-profile.md\")\n\n# Default escalate system prompt (fallback if prompt file not found)\nESCALATE_SYSTEM_PROMPT = \"\"\"You are ADC's escalate handler. Your job is to formulate a clear, actionable NEEDLE bead body from a user's intent.\n\nA NEEDLE bead is a task work item with:\n- A clear title describing what needs to be done\n- A detailed body with context, requirements, and success criteria\n- Proper structure for Claude Code to execute\n\nGiven the user's intent and any available context, produce a bead body that:\n1. Captures the full scope of the request\n2. Includes relevant context (project, cluster, specific resources)\n3. Defines clear success criteria\n4. Structures the work for Claude Code execution\n\nOutput ONLY the bead body as markdown. Do not include explanations or meta-commentary.\"\"\"\n\n\ndef load_escalate_prompt() -> str:\n    \"\"\"Load the escalate prompt from the prompts directory.\"\"\"\n    try:\n        with open(ESCALATE_PROMPT_PATH, \"r\") as f:\n            content = f.read()\n            # Extract the system prompt section (between \"System Prompt:\" and \"Input Context:\")\n            # For now, just use the whole file - the LLM can handle the structure\n            return ESCALATE_SYSTEM_PROMPT  # Use default for now\n    except FileNotFoundError:\n        logger.warning(f\"Escalate prompt not found at {ESCALATE_PROMPT_PATH}, using default\")\n        return ESCALATE_SYSTEM_PROMPT\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass EscalateRequest:\n    \"\"\"Request to escalate an intent to a bead.\"\"\"\n    intent_id: str\n    session_id: str\n    utterance: str\n    intent_type: str\n    project_slug: str | None = None\n    topic_id: str | None = None\n    context: dict = field(default_factory=dict)\n    metadata: dict = field(default_factory=dict)\n\n    def to_dict(self) -> dict:\n        \"\"\"Convert to dictionary.\"\"\"\n        return {\n            \"intent_id\": self.intent_id,\n            \"session_id\": self.session_id,\n            \"utterance\": self.utterance,\n            \"intent_type\": self.intent_type,\n            \"project_slug\": self.project_slug,\n            \"topic_id\": self.topic_id,\n            \"context\": self.context,\n            \"metadata\": self.metadata,\n        }\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass EscalateResult:\n    \"\"\"Result of escalating an intent to a bead.\"\"\"\n    bead_id: str\n    intent_id: str\n    pending_card: dict\n    status: str = \"pending\"  # pending, created, failed\n\n    def to_dict(self) -> dict:\n        \"\"\"Convert to dictionary.\"\"\"\n        return {\n            \"bead_id\": self.bead_id,\n            \"intent_id\": self.intent_id,\n            \"pending_card\": self.pending_card,\n            \"status\": self.status,\n        }\n\n\nclass EscalateError(Exception):\n    \"\"\"Base exception for escalate errors.\"\"\"\n    pass\n\n\nclass BeadCreationError(EscalateError):\n    \"\"\"Bead creation failed.\"\"\"\n    pass\n\n\nclass EscalateHandler:\n    \"\"\"\n    Escalate handler for task-profile intents.\n\n    Handles the full escalate flow:\n    1. Formulate bead body via LLM\n    2. Create bead via br CLI\n    3. Return pending-card spec\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, store=None):\n        self.store = store\n        self._zai_client = None\n\n    async def _get_zai_client(self):\n        \"\"\"Get or create ZAI client.\"\"\"\n        if self._zai_client is None:\n            self._zai_client = get_zai_client()\n        return self._zai_client\n\n    async def _get_store(self):\n        \"\"\"Get or create session store.\"\"\"\n        if self.store is None:\n            self.store = get_store()\n        return self.store\n\n    async def formulate_bead_body(\n        self,\n        request: EscalateRequest,\n    ) -> str:\n        \"\"\"\n        Formulate a bead body using the LLM.\n\n        Takes the intent and context, produces a well-structured bead body.\n        \"\"\"\n        client = await self._get_zai_client()\n        system_prompt = load_escalate_prompt()\n\n        # Build context for the LLM\n        context_parts = [\n            f\"User utterance: {request.utterance}\",\n            f\"Intent type: {request.intent_type}\",\n        ]\n\n        if request.project_slug:\n            context_parts.append(f\"Project: {request.project_slug}\")\n\n        if request.topic_id:\n            context_parts.append(f\"Topic ID: {request.topic_id}\")\n\n        # Add any additional context\n        if request.context:\n            context_parts.append(f\"\\nAdditional context:\")\n            for key, value in request.context.items():\n                context_parts.append(f\"  {key}: {value}\")\n\n        # Build the user message\n        user_message = \"\\n\".join([\n            \"Formulate a NEEDLE bead body for this intent:\",\n            \"\",\n            *context_parts,\n            \"\",\n            \"The bead body should be clear, actionable, and structured for Claude Code execution.\",\n        ])\n\n        logger.info(f\"Formulating bead body for intent {request.intent_id}\")\n\n        # Make LLM call\n        try:\n            bead_body = await client.call_simple(\n                system_prompt=system_prompt,\n                user_message=user_message,\n                model=ModelClass.SONNET.value,\n                max_tokens=4096,\n                temperature=0.7,\n            )\n\n            logger.info(f\"Formulated bead body for intent {request.intent_id}: {len(bead_body)} chars\")\n            return bead_body\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Failed to formulate bead body: {e}\")\n            raise EscalateError(f\"Failed to formulate bead body: {e}\") from e\n\n    async def create_bead(\n        self,\n        request: EscalateRequest,\n        bead_body: str,\n    ) -> str:\n        \"\"\"\n        Create a bead using the br CLI.\n\n        Returns the bead ID.\n        \"\"\"\n        # Generate bead title from intent\n        title = self._generate_bead_title(request)\n\n        # Prepare metadata (includes session_id for bead watcher routing)\n        metadata = {\n            \"session_id\": request.session_id,\n            \"intent_id\": request.intent_id,\n            \"intent_type\": request.intent_type,\n            \"origin_surface_id\": request.metadata.get(\"surface_id\"),\n            \"created_at\": int(datetime.now(timezone.utc).timestamp()),\n        }\n\n        if request.project_slug:\n            metadata[\"project_slug\"] = request.project_slug\n\n        if request.topic_id:\n            metadata[\"topic_id\"] = request.topic_id\n\n        # Build br create command\n        # Using br CLI to create the bead\n        # Note: br uses --description for the main body content\n        try:\n            # Build command with description (escape bead body for shell)\n            cmd = [\n                \"br\",\n                \"create\",\n                \"--title\", title,\n                \"--type\", \"task\",  # task-profile intents create task beads\n                \"--description\", bead_body,\n            ]\n\n            # Add labels for metadata tracking\n            # Labels are simple strings, we'll encode key=value for structured data\n            for key, value in metadata.items():\n                if value is not None:\n                    cmd.extend([\"--label\", f\"{key}={value}\"])\n\n            proc = await asyncio.create_subprocess_exec(\n                *cmd,\n                stdout=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,\n                stderr=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,\n            )\n\n            stdout, stderr = await proc.communicate()\n\n            if proc.returncode != 0:\n                error_msg = stderr.decode(\"utf-8\", errors=\"replace\")\n                logger.error(f\"br create failed: {error_msg}\")\n                raise BeadCreationError(f\"br create failed: {error_msg}\")\n\n            # Parse bead ID from output\n            output = stdout.decode(\"utf-8\", errors=\"replace\")\n            bead_id = self._extract_bead_id(output)\n\n            logger.info(f\"Created bead {bead_id} for intent {request.intent_id}\")\n            return bead_id\n\n        except FileNotFoundError:\n            logger.error(\"br CLI not found\")\n            raise BeadCreationError(\"br CLI not found\")\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Failed to create bead: {e}\")\n            raise BeadCreationError(f\"Failed to create bead: {e}\") from e\n\n    def _generate_bead_title(self, request: EscalateRequest) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Generate a bead title from the request.\"\"\"\n        # Use utterance prefix as title\n        utterance = request.utterance.strip()\n        if len(utterance) > 60:\n            title = utterance[:57] + \"...\"\n        else:\n            title = utterance\n\n        # Add project prefix if available\n        if request.project_slug:\n            title = f\"[{request.project_slug}] {title}\"\n\n        return title\n\n    def _extract_bead_id(self, output: str) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Extract bead ID from br create output.\"\"\"\n        # br output format: \"Created bead abc-123\"\n        # or just the bead ID\n        lines = output.strip().split(\"\\n\")\n        for line in lines:\n            if \"Created bead\" in line or \"bead\" in line.lower():\n                # Try to extract ID (format: abc-123)\n                parts = line.split()\n                for part in parts:\n                    if \"-\" in part and len(part) > 5:\n                        return part\n\n        # Fallback: return first word that looks like a bead ID\n        for word in output.split():\n            if \"-\" in word and 3 < len(word) < 20:\n                return word\n\n        # Last resort: try to find a pattern like abc-123 anywhere in output\n        import re\n        # Pattern for bead ID: letters-numbers format like abc-123 (not letters-letters)\n        # This avoids matching words like \"def-in\" or \"some-output\"\n        matches = re.findall(r'\\b[a-z]{2,4}-[0-9]{2,6}\\b', output, re.IGNORECASE)\n        if matches:\n            return min(matches, key=len)\n\n        # Last resort: generate a UUID\n        logger.warning(f\"Could not extract bead ID from br output: {output}\")\n        return str(uuid.uuid4())\n\n    def build_pending_card(\n        self,\n        request: EscalateRequest,\n        bead_id: str,\n    ) -> dict:\n        \"\"\"\n        Build a pending-card spec for the surface.\n\n        The pending card shows the user that work is in progress\n        and will be delivered when the bead closes.\n        \"\"\"\n        return {\n            \"type\": \"pending\",\n            \"id\": f\"pending-{bead_id}\",\n            \"intent_id\": request.intent_id,\n            \"bead_id\": bead_id,\n            \"title\": self._generate_bead_title(request),\n            \"summary\": f\"Working on: {request.utterance[:100]}\",\n            \"status\": \"pending\",\n            \"urgency\": request.metadata.get(\"urgency\", \"normal\"),\n            \"created_at\": int(datetime.now(timezone.utc).timestamp()),\n            \"metadata\": {\n                \"project_slug\": request.project_slug,\n                \"topic_id\": request.topic_id,\n                \"bead_type\": \"task\",\n            },\n        }\n\n    async def escalate_intent(self, request: EscalateRequest) -> EscalateResult:\n        \"\"\"\n        Escalate an intent to a bead.\n\n        Full flow:\n        1. Formulate bead body via LLM\n        2. Create bead via br CLI\n        3. Return pending-card spec\n\n        Args:\n            request: The escalate request\n\n        Returns:\n            EscalateResult with bead ID and pending card\n        \"\"\"\n        logger.info(f\"Escalating intent {request.intent_id} to bead\")\n\n        try:\n            # Step 1: Formulate bead body\n            bead_body = await self.formulate_bead_body(request)\n\n            # Step 2: Create bead\n            bead_id = await self.create_bead(request, bead_body)\n\n            # Step 3: Build pending card\n            pending_card = self.build_pending_card(request, bead_id)\n\n            # Update intent in store with bead reference\n            store = await self._get_store()\n            await store.update_intent_status(\n                intent_id=request.intent_id,\n                status=\"dispatched\",\n            )\n\n            # Also update the bead_ref field\n            # (This would require a schema update, for now we track via metadata)\n\n            logger.info(f\"Escalated intent {request.intent_id} to bead {bead_id}\")\n\n            return EscalateResult(\n                bead_id=bead_id,\n                intent_id=request.intent_id,\n                pending_card=pending_card,\n                status=\"created\",\n            )\n\n        except EscalateError:\n            raise\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Escalate failed for intent {request.intent_id}: {e}\")\n            raise EscalateError(f\"Escalate failed: {e}\") from e\n\n\n# Global escalate handler instance\n_handler: Optional[EscalateHandler] = None\n\n\ndef get_escalate_handler(store=None) -> EscalateHandler:\n    \"\"\"Get or create the global escalate handler instance.\"\"\"\n    global _handler\n    if _handler is None:\n        _handler = EscalateHandler(store=store)\n    return _handler\n\n\nasync def escalate_intent(request: EscalateRequest) -> EscalateResult:\n    \"\"\"\n    Convenience function to escalate an intent.\n\n    Args:\n        request: The escalate request\n\n    Returns:\n        EscalateResult with bead ID and pending card\n    \"\"\"\n    handler = get_escalate_handler()\n    return await handler.escalate_intent(request)\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":291,"oldLines":35,"newStart":291,"newLines":24,"lines":["         return title"," ","     def _extract_bead_id(self, output: str) -> str:","-        \"\"\"Extract bead ID from br create output.\"\"\"","-        # Your job is to formulate a clear, actionable NEEDLE bead body from a user's intent.\n\nA NEEDLE bead is a task work item with:\n- A clear title describing what needs to be done\n- A detailed body with context, requirements, and success criteria\n- Proper structure for Claude Code to execute\n\nGiven the user's intent and any available context, produce a bead body that:\n1. Captures the full scope of the request\n2. Includes relevant context (project, cluster, specific resources)\n3. Defines clear success criteria\n4. Structures the work for Claude Code execution\n\nOutput ONLY the bead body as markdown. Do not include explanations or meta-commentary.\"\"\"\n\n\ndef load_escalate_prompt() -> str:\n    \"\"\"Load the escalate prompt from the prompts directory.\"\"\"\n    try:\n        with open(ESCALATE_PROMPT_PATH, \"r\") as f:\n            content = f.read()\n            # Extract the system prompt section (between \"System Prompt:\" and \"Input Context:\")\n            # For now, just use the whole file - Formulate bead body via LLM\n    2. Create bead via br CLI\n    3. Return pending-card spec\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, store=None):\n        self.store = store\n        self._zai_client = None\n\n    async def _get_zai_client(self):\n        \"\"\"Get or create ZAI client.\"\"\"\n        if self._zai_client is None:\n            self._zai_client = get_zai_client()\n        return self._zai_client\n\n    async def _get_store(self):\n        \"\"\"Get or create session store.\"\"\"\n        if self.store is None:\n            self.store = get_store()\n        return self.store\n\n    async def formulate_bead_body(\n        self,\n        request: EscalateRequest,\n    ) -> str:\n        \"\"\"\n        Formulate a bead body using the LLM.\n\n        Takes the intent and context, produces a well-structured bead body.\n        \"\"\"\n        client = await self._get_zai_client()\n        system_prompt = load_escalate_prompt()\n\n        # Build context for the LLM\n        context_parts = [\n            f\"User utterance: {request.utterance}\",\n            f\"Intent type: {request.intent_type}\",\n        ]\n\n        if request.project_slug:\n            context_parts.append(f\"Project: {request.project_slug}\")\n\n        if request.topic_id:\n            context_parts.append(f\"Topic ID: {request.topic_id}\")\n\n        # Add any additional context\n        if request.context:\n            context_parts.append(f\"\\nAdditional context:\")\n            for key, value in request.context.items():\n                context_parts.append(f\"  {key}: {value}\")\n\n        # Build the user message\n        user_message = \"\\n\".join([\n            \"Formulate a NEEDLE bead body for this intent:\",\n            \"\",\n            *context_parts,\n            \"\",\n            \"The bead body should be clear, actionable, and structured for Claude Code execution.\",\n        ])\n\n        logger.info(f\"Formulating bead body for intent {request.intent_id}\")\n\n        # Make LLM call\n        try:\n            bead_body = await client.call_simple(\n                system_prompt=system_prompt,\n                user_message=user_message,\n                model=ModelClass.SONNET.value,\n                max_tokens=4096,\n                temperature=0.7,\n            )\n\n            logger.info(f\"Formulated bead body for intent {request.intent_id}: {len(bead_body)} chars\")\n            return bead_body\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Failed to formulate bead body: {e}\")\n            raise EscalateError(f\"Failed to formulate bead body: {e}\") from e\n\n    async def create_bead(\n        self,\n        request: EscalateRequest,\n        bead_body: str,\n    ) -> str:\n        \"\"\"\n        Create a bead using the br CLI.\n\n        Returns the bead ID.\n        \"\"\"\n        # Build br create command\n        # Using br CLI to create the bead\n        # Note: br uses --description for the main body content\n        try:\n            # Build command with description (escape bead body for shell)\n            cmd = [\n                \"br\",\n                \"create\",\n                \"--title\", title,\n                \"--type\", \"task\",  # task-profile intents create task beads\n                \"--description\", bead_body,\n            ]\n\n            # Add labels for metadata tracking\n            # Labels are simple strings, we'll encode key=value for structured data\n            for key, value in metadata.items():\n                if value is not None:\n                    cmd.extend([\"--label\", f\"{key}={value}\"])\n\n            proc = await asyncio.create_subprocess_exec(\n                *cmd,\n                stdout=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,\n                stderr=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,\n            )\n\n            stdout, stderr = await proc.communicate()\n\n            if proc.returncode != 0:\n                error_msg = stderr.decode(\"utf-8\", errors=\"replace\")\n                logger.error(f\"br create failed: {error_msg}\")\n                raise BeadCreationError(f\"br create failed: {error_msg}\")\n\n            # Parse bead ID from output\n            output = stdout.decode(\"utf-8\", errors=\"replace\")\n            bead_id = self._extract_bead_id(output)\n\n            logger.info(f\"Created bead {bead_id} for intent {request.intent_id}\")\n            return bead_id\n\n        except FileNotFoundError:\n            logger.error(\"br CLI not found\")\n            raise BeadCreationError(\"br CLI not found\")\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Failed to create bead: {e}\")\n            raise BeadCreationError(f\"Failed to create bead: {e}\") from e\n\n    def _generate_bead_title(self, request: EscalateRequest) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Generate a bead title from the request.\"\"\"\n        # Use utterance prefix as title\n        utterance = request.utterance.strip()\n        if len(utterance) > 60:\n            title = utterance[:57] + \"...\"\n        else:\n            title = utterance\n\n        # Add project prefix if available\n        if request.project_slug:\n            title = f\"[{request.project_slug}] {title}\"\n\n        return title\n\n    def _extract_bead_id(self, output: str) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Extract bead ID from br create output.\n\n        br create outputs just the bead ID (e.g., \"abc-123\").\n        \"\"\"\n        # br output format: just the bead ID (e.g., \"adc-2fs\")\n        bead_id = output.strip()\n\n        if not bead_id:\n            logger.warning(f\"Empty br create output\")\n            return str(uuid.uuid4())\n\n        # Basic validation: should contain a dash and be reasonable length\n        if \"-\" not in bead_id or len(bead_id) < 3:\n            logger.warning(f\"Unexpected br create output format: {output}\")\n            # Still return it - br might have changed format\n\n        return bead_id\n\n    def build_pending_card(\n        self,\n        request: EscalateRequest,\n        bead_id: str,\n    ) -> dict:\n        \"\"\"\n        Build a pending-card spec for the surface.\n\n        The pending card shows the user that work is in progress\n        and will be delivered when the bead closes.\n        \"\"\"\n        return {\n            \"type\": \"pending\",\n            \"id\": f\"pending-{bead_id}\",\n            \"intent_id\": request.intent_id,\n            \"bead_id\": bead_id,\n            \"title\": self._generate_bead_title(request),\n            \"summary\": f\"Working on: {request.utterance[:100]}\",\n            \"status\": \"pending\",\n            \"urgency\": request.metadata.get(\"urgency\", \"normal\"),\n            \"created_at\": int(datetime.now(timezone.utc).timestamp()),\n            \"metadata\": {\n                \"project_slug\": request.project_slug,\n                \"topic_id\": request.topic_id,\n                \"bead_type\": \"task\",\n            },\n        }\n\n    async def escalate_intent(self, request: EscalateRequest) -> EscalateResult:\n        \"\"\"\n        Escalate an intent to a bead.\n\n        Full flow:\n        1. Formulate bead body via LLM\n        2. Create bead via br CLI\n        3. Return pending-card spec\n\n        Args:\n            request: The escalate request\n\n        Returns:\n            EscalateResult with bead ID and pending card\n        \"\"\"\n        logger.info(f\"Escalating intent {request.intent_id} to bead\")\n\n        try:\n            # Step 1: Formulate bead body\n            bead_body = await self.formulate_bead_body(request)\n\n            # Step 2: Create bead\n            bead_id = await self.create_bead(request, bead_body)\n\n            # Step 3: Build pending card\n            pending_card = self.build_pending_card(request, bead_id)\n\n            # Update intent in store with bead reference\n            store = await self._get_store()\n            await store.update_intent_status(\n                intent_id=request.intent_id,\n                status=\"dispatched\",\n            )\n\n            # Read new lines from beads.jsonl\n92\t        events = await self._read_new_bead_events(beads_path)\n93\t\n94\t        for event in events:\n95\t            await self._process_bead_event(event)\n96\t\n97\t    async def _read_new_bead_events(self, beads_path: Path) -> list[BeadEvent]:\n98\t        \"\"\"Read new bead events from beads.jsonl.\"\"\"\n99\t        events = []\n100\t\n101\t        try:\n102\t            with open(beads_path, \"r\") as f:\n103\t                # Seek to last position\n104\t                f.seek(self._last_position)\n105\t                new_lines = f.readlines()\n106\t\n107\t                # Update position\n108\t                self._last_position = f.tell()\n109\t\n110\t                for line in new_lines:\n111\t                    if not line.strip():\n112\t                        continue\n113\t\n114\t                    try:\n115\t                        bead = json.loads(line)\n116\t                        bead_id = bead.get(\"id\")\n117\t                        status = bead.get(\"status\")\n118\t\n119\t                        if not bead_id or bead_id in self._processed_beads:\n120\t                            continue\n121\t\n122\t                        # Extract metadata\n145\t        metadata = bead_data.get(\"metadata\", {})\n146\t        session_id = metadata.get(\"session_id\")\n147\t        surface_id = metadata.get(\"origin_surface_id\")\n148\t\n149\t        if not session_id:\n150\t            # No session_id - can't route\n151\t            logger.warning(f\"Bead {event.bead_id} has no session_id in metadata\")\n152\t            return\n153\t\n154\t        # Determine target surface\n155\t        decision = await self.router.route_result(\n156\t            session_id=session_id,\n157\t            origin_surface_id=surface_id,\n158\t            urgency=metadata.get(\"urgency\", \"normal\"),\n159\t        )\n160\t\n161\t        # Extract result from bead\n162\t        result = await self._extract_result_from_bead(bead_data, session_id)\n163\t\n164\t        if not result:\n165\t            logger.warning(f\"Could not extract result from bead {event.bead_id}\")\n166\t            return\n167\t\n168\t        # Route to target surfaces\n169\t        if decision.target_surfaces:\n170\t            for surface in decision.target_surfaces:\n171\t                if surface.type == \"telegram\":\n172\t                    await self._send_to_telegram(result, session_id)\n173\t                else:\n174\t                    # SSE broadcast\n175\t                    await broadcast_result(\n176\t                        result=result,\n177\t                        session_id=session_id,\n178\t                        target_surface_id=surface.id,\n179\t                    )\n180\t        elif decision.fallback_used:\n181\t            # Fallback to Telegram\n182\t            await self._send_to_telegram(result, session_id)\n183\t        else:\n184\t            # No surface available - result stays in queue\n185\t            logger.info(f\"No surface available for bead {event.bead_id}, result queued\")\n186\t\n187\t    async def _extract_result_from_bead(self, bead: dict, session_id: str) -> Optional[dict]:\n188\t        \"\"\"Extract result data from a closed bead.\"\"\"\n189\t        # Try to extract structured result from bead body\n190\t        body = bead.get(\"body\", \"\")\n191\t        metadata = bead.get(\"metadata\", {})\n192\t\n193\t        # If metadata already has result structure, use it\n194\t        if \"result\" in metadata:\n195\t            return metadata[\"result\"]\n196\t\n197\t        # Try to parse result from body\n198\t        # For now, create a basic result from the bead\n199\t        return {\n200\t            \"id\": bead.get(\"id\"),\n201\t            \"type\": \"bead_result\",\n202\t            \"summary\": body[:200] if len(body) > 200 else body,  # 'created', 'updated', 'closed', 'commented'\n    timestamp: int\n    data: dict\n\n\nclass BeadWatcher:\n    \"\"\"\n    Watches for bead events and routes results to surfaces.\n\n    Integration with br CLI (beads_rust):\n    - Reads beads JSONL file for closed beads\n    - Extracts session_id and surface_id from bead metadata\n    - Pushes results to active surfaces via SSE\n    - Falls back to Telegram if no surface available\n    \"\"\"\n\n    CHECK_INTERVAL_SECONDS = 5\n    BEADS_JSONL = \".beads/beads.jsonl\"\n\n    def __init__(self, store: SessionStore, router: SurfaceRouter):\n        self.store = store\n        self.router = router\n        self._running = False\n        self._task: Optional[asyncio.Task] = None\n        self._last_position = 0  # Position in beads.jsonl\n        self._processed_beads: set[str] = set()\n\n    async def start(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Start the bead watcher daemon.\"\"\"\n        self._running = True\n        self._task = asyncio.create_task(self._watch_loop())\n        logger.info(\"Bead watcher started\")\n\n    async def stop(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Stop the bead watcher daemon.\"\"\"\n        self._running = False\n        if self._task:\n            self._task.cancel()\n            try:\n                await self._task\n            except asyncio.CancelledError:\n                pass\n        logger.info(\"Bead watcher stopped\")\n\n    async def _watch_loop(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Main watch loop - checks for new bead events.\"\"\"\n        while self._running:\n            try:\n                await self._check_for_events()\n                await asyncio.sleep(self.CHECK_INTERVAL_SECONDS)\n            except asyncio.CancelledError:\n                break\n            except Exception as e:\n                logger.error(f\"Error in bead watch loop: {e}\", exc_info=True)\n                await asyncio.sleep(self.CHECK_INTERVAL_SECONDS)\n\n    async def _check_for_events(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Check for new bead events and process them.\"\"\"\n        beads_path = Path(self.BEADS_JSONL)\n        if not beads_path.exists():\n            return\n\n        # Read new lines from beads.jsonl\n        events = await self._read_new_bead_events(beads_path)\n\n        for event in events:\n            await self._process_bead_event(event)\n\n    async def _read_new_bead_events(self, beads_path: Path) -> list[BeadEvent]:\n        \"\"\"Read new bead events from beads.jsonl.\"\"\"\n        events = []\n\n        try:\n            with open(beads_path, \"r\") as f:\n                # Seek to last position\n                f.seek(self._last_position)\n                new_lines = f.readlines()\n\n                # Update position\n                self._last_position = f.tell()\n\n                for line in new_lines:\n                    if not line.strip():\n                        continue\n\n                    try:\n                        bead = json.loads(line)\n                        bead_id = bead.get(\"id\")\n                        status = bead.get(\"status\")\n\n                        if not bead_id or bead_id in self._processed_beads:\n                            continue\n\n                        # Process closed beads\n                        if status == \"closed\":\n                            events.append(BeadEvent(\n                                bead_id=bead_id,\n                                event_type=\"closed\",\n                                timestamp=int(datetime.now().timestamp()),\n                                data=bead,\n                            ))\n                            self._processed_beads.add(bead_id)\n\n                    except json.JSONDecodeError as e:\n                        logger.warning(f\"Failed to parse bead JSON: {e}\")\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Error reading beads file: {e}\")\n\n        return events\n\n    async def _process_bead_event(self, event: BeadEvent) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Process a bead event and route to surfaces.\"\"\"\n        bead_data = event.data\n\n        # Extract metadata\n        metadata = bead_data.get(\"metadata\", {})\n        session_id = metadata.get(\"session_id\")\n        surface_id = metadata.get(\"origin_surface_id\")\n\n        if not session_id:\n            # No session_id - can't route\n            logger.warning(f\"Bead {event.bead_id} has no session_id in metadata\")\n            return\n\n        # Determine target surface\n        decision = await self.router.route_result(\n            session_id=session_id,\n            origin_surface_id=surface_id,\n            urgency=metadata.get(\"urgency\", \"normal\"),\n        )\n\n        # Extract result from bead\n        result = await self._extract_result_from_bead(bead_data, session_id)\n\n        if not result:\n            logger.warning(f\"Could not extract result from bead {event.bead_id}\")\n            return\n\n        # Route to target surfaces\n        if decision.target_surfaces:\n            for surface in decision.target_surfaces:\n                if surface.type == \"telegram\":\n                    await self._send_to_telegram(result, session_id)\n                else:\n                    # SSE broadcast\n                    await broadcast_result(\n                        result=result,\n                        session_id=session_id,\n                        target_surface_id=surface.id,\n                    )\n        elif decision.fallback_used:\n            # Fallback to Telegram\n            await self._send_to_telegram(result, session_id)\n        else:\n            # No surface available - result stays in queue\n            logger.info(f\"No surface available for bead {event.bead_id}, result queued\")\n\n    async def _extract_result_from_bead(self, bead: dict, session_id: str) -> Optional[dict]:\n        \"\"\"Extract result data from a closed bead.\"\"\"\n        # Try to extract structured result from bead body\n        body = bead.get(\"body\", \"\")\n        metadata = bead.get(\"metadata\", {})\n\n        # If metadata already has result structure, use it\n        if \"result\" in metadata:\n            return metadata[\"result\"]\n\n        # Try to parse result from body\n        # For now, create a basic result from the bead\n        return {\n            \"id\": bead.get(\"id\"),\n            \"type\": \"bead_result\",\n            \"summary\": body[:200] if len(body) > 200 else body,  # Truncate for summary\n            \"data\": {\n                \"bead_id\": bead.get(\"id\"),\n                \"title\": bead.get(\"title\"),\n                \"type\": bead.get(\"type\"),\n                \"body\": body,\n                \"status\": bead.get(\"status\"),\n            },\n            \"urgency\": metadata.get(\"urgency\", \"normal\"),\n            \"created_at\": int(datetime.now().timestamp()),\n            \"surfaced_at\": int(datetime.now().timestamp()),\n        }\n\n    async def _send_to_telegram(self, result: dict, session_id: str) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Send result to Telegram via telegram-claude-bridge.\"\"\"\n        try:\n            # telegram-claude-bridge runs on Tailscale mesh\n            async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:\n                response = await client.post(\n                    \"http://telegram-claude-bridge:8000/send_message\",\n                    json={\n                        \"session_id\": session_id,\n                        \"message\": self._format_telegram_message(result),\n                    },\n                    timeout=5.0,\n                )\n                if response.status_code == 200:\n                    logger.info(f\"Sent result to Telegram for session {session_id}\")\n                else:\n                    logger.warning(f\"Failed to send to Telegram: {response.status_code}\")\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Error sending to Telegram: {e}\")\n\n    def _format_telegram_message(self, result: dict) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Format result as Telegram message.\"\"\"\n        summary = result.get(\"summary\", \"Result available\")\n        urgency = result.get(\"urgency\", \"normal\")\n\n        emoji_map = {\n            \"critical\": \"🚨\",\n            \"high\": \"⚠️\",\n            \"normal\": \"📌\",\n            \"low\": \"💬\",\n        }\n\n        emoji = emoji_map.get(urgency, \"📌\")\n\n        # Build message\n        lines = [\n            f\"{emoji} {summary}\",\n        ]\n\n        # Add detail if available\n        data = result.get(\"data\", {})\n        if \"bead_id\" in data:\n            lines.append(f\"Bead: {data['bead_id']}\")\n\n        return \"\\n\".join(lines)\n\n\nasync def create_bead_watcher(store: SessionStore, router: SurfaceRouter) -> BeadWatcher:\n    \"\"\"Create and start a bead watcher daemon.\"\"\"\n    watcher = BeadWatcher(store, router)\n    await watcher.start()\n    return watcher\n","numLines":267,"startLine":1,"totalLines":267}}}
